quests.title: Fix Login 500 Error
quests.description: Users get a 500 Internal Server Error when logging in with an email that contains a plus sign (e.g., user+test@example.com). The backend auth middleware doesn't URL-decode the email before lookup.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/login returns 200 for emails with + characters
Existing users with + in email can log in successfully
No regression for standard email formats

quests.title: Dashboard Not Updating in Real-Time
quests.description: When one user makes changes on mobile, the desktop dashboard doesn't reflect updates until a full page refresh. WebSocket events are emitted but the frontend isn't listening.
acceptanceCriteria: Desktop dashboard updates within 5 seconds of any change
No manual page refresh required
WebSocket reconnection handles network drops gracefully

quests.title: Admin Role Can't Access Settings Page
quests.description: The settings page returns 403 for admin users. The route guard checks for 'superadmin' role but the settings page should be accessible to both 'admin' and 'superadmin' roles.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin users can access /settings without 403
Role check allows both admin and superadmin
Non-admin users still get 403

quests.title: Merge Pending PRs (#12, #13, #14)
quests.description: Three approved PRs have been sitting for a week. Review any final comments, resolve conflicts if needed, and merge to dev.
acceptanceCriteria: All three PRs merged to dev
No merge conflicts remaining
CI passes on dev after merge

quests.title: Add Address Autocomplete to Forms
quests.description: Address input fields are plain text. Replace with a geocoding-powered typeahead that suggests addresses as the user types and populates street, city, state, zip fields on selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Address fields show suggestions as user types
Selecting a suggestion populates individual fields (street, city, state, zip)
Each field is individually editable after auto-fill
Shared component reused across all address inputs

quests.title: Currency Formatting on Price Inputs
quests.description: Price and payment inputs show raw numbers (e.g., 250000). Should display with $ prefix and comma separators ($250,000).
acceptanceCriteria: All price inputs display with $ prefix and comma formatting
Underlying value remains a clean number for the API
Formatting works on both input and display

quests.title: Form Wizard: Edit Without Restarting
quests.description: On the review page of multi-step forms, tapping 'Edit' sends the user back to that step and forces them to re-walk all subsequent steps. Should jump to the field and return to review.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit on review page opens just that field (inline or modal)
After editing, user returns directly to review page
No need to re-walk intermediate steps

quests.title: Show Inline Validation Errors on Registration
quests.description: Registration form shows a generic 'Something went wrong' toast when validation fails. Backend returns field-specific errors but the form doesn't display them.
acceptanceCriteria: Field-level error messages appear under the relevant input
No generic toast for validation failures
Backend errors are parsed and mapped to form fields

quests.title: PDF Document Generation on Form Submit
quests.description: When users submit certain forms, a PDF should be generated with their responses and attached to their record. Currently no document is produced.
acceptanceCriteria: PDF generates on form submission with all relevant data
PDF attaches to the user's record automatically
PDF is viewable and downloadable from the documents section
Professional formatting suitable for external use

quests.title: Dark Mode Support
quests.description: Add a dark mode toggle that respects system preference by default. Should persist the user's choice across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Dark mode toggle in settings/header
Respects OS prefers-color-scheme by default
Preference persists in localStorage
All components render correctly in both modes

quests.title: Add User Activity Feed
quests.description: Show a chronological feed of recent actions (form submissions, document uploads, status changes) on the dashboard. Helps team members see what's happening without checking each section.
acceptanceCriteria: Activity feed shows recent actions with timestamps
Feed updates in real-time via WebSocket
Filterable by action type
Paginated for performance

quests.title: Notification: Tell Users Who Gets Notified
quests.description: When an action triggers notifications, tell the user explicitly who was notified. Builds trust and transparency.
acceptanceCriteria: After triggering an action, UI shows 'Notified: [names/roles]'
Pattern is consistent across all notification-triggering actions

quests.title: Inline Document Viewer
quests.description: Currently documents open via external URL in a new tab. Add an inline viewer with download/share buttons directly in the app.
acceptanceCriteria: PDFs render inline using a viewer component
Download and Share buttons available
Works on both desktop and mobile

quests.title: Polish Date/Time Picker
quests.description: Replace native HTML date/time inputs with a polished, mobile-friendly custom picker that matches the app's design language.
acceptanceCriteria: Custom date/time picker replaces native inputs
Large touch targets for mobile use
Matches app design language

quests.title: Document Naming on Upload
quests.description: No way to set a display name when uploading documents. Should be able to name on upload and rename after.
acceptanceCriteria: Upload dialog includes a name field
Existing documents can be renamed

quests.title: Online Presence Indicator
quests.description: Show real-time online/offline status for team members using existing WebSocket connections. Green dot = online, gray = offline.
acceptanceCriteria: Green dot next to online team members
Gray dot for offline members
Uses existing WebSocket connections

quests.title: Clean Up Stale GitHub Branches
quests.description: Over 100 remote branches, most already merged. Prune merged branches and document a policy for branch cleanup.
acceptanceCriteria: All merged branches are deleted from remote
Branch cleanup policy documented in contributing guide
